name: ProShares Trust II
business: ProShares Trust II offers shares of ProShares Ultra Silver, a leveraged fund that seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, corresponding to two times (2x) the daily performance of the Bloomberg Silver Subindex SM, which tracks silver futures contracts.

exposures.sentence: ProShares Ultra Silver and ProShares UltraShort Silver are designed to correspond, before fees and expenses, to two times (2x) or two times the inverse (-2x), respectively, of the daily performance of the Bloomberg Silver Subindex SM.
